snippet.title: César Soto Valero
snippet.description:
I traveled from Cuba to Sweden to pursue my life’s dream and grind my way through a PhD in Computer Science, a journey that was all about simplifying complexity. Along this path, I discovered my true passion: breaking down technical concepts into clear, practical insights that can be easily understood and applied right away.

My mission today is to help engineers learn consistently, think deeply, and transform their careers. With this aim, I share both the fundamentals and the real-world lessons I’ve got from over two decades in higher education, research and development, and working in the software industry.

👉 If you like this channel, you can help by subscribing or sharing one of my videos with a friend. You can also support me through Ko-fi (link below). I really appreciate it!
